state.next-action:
Session 2026-04-17a — TRACK 3 COMPLETE.
42.4-21 done: `/how-it-works` pressure section now has a "Live example" card between the dimensions table and Shannon entropy decomposition. Computes current values from `site/data/self-eval.json.latest.phases_pressure`, picks the top-pressure phase (currently 42.2, P = 173.41, H_d = 14.91, H_l = 29.09), and renders a Term/Raw/Weight/Contribution table plus H_d / H_l sub-cards. Reader now sees the formula evaluated end-to-end against real planning data, not abstract weights. Typecheck + `npm run build` clean; dev-server probe confirmed rendered output.
Also in HEAD (prior session): gad-225 CLI split (`gad site` vs `gad play` / `gad generation open`) and 42.4-20.
User-defined track order for remainder: 45 → editor → project-market → VCS.
NEXT per user order: phase 45 wave 2+ (45-01..21). Largest remaining pickup. Recommended opener: 45-04 vocabulary constants file (single-source term mapping, gad-166/169/170) — smallest dep, unblocks 45-15 audit and later marketing copy. Alternatives: 45-01 project-detail tab shell, 45-02 per-project data adapter.
After 45 lands: 44.5 editor (Project Editor + Brood Editor + DNA Editor), then 44 project-market redesign wave 2, then TRACK 2 VCS portability spawn.
TODOS (15) remain parked: vcs-video-and-primitives, vcs-primitives-redesign, gad-generate-commands, desktop-client-and-skill-authoring, decentralized-auto-contributor, context-framework-builder-project, site-content-gaps, species-tracking-and-showcase, site-article-parallel-subagent-cost, structural-parallelism-task-outbox, lightweight-agent-and-scoped-snapshot, editor-ux-and-platform, generate-publish-play-pipeline (blocking), media-service-infra, site-as-project-template.
